calendar.matters:
No-Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ADREAN WILLIAMS' Re-Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer To Complaint is off calendar. Duplicate entry. (301/PJB/CK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Advanced From Oct-16-06 To Oct-11-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Carlson, Esq. of Baker & McKenzis, 415-576-3011 for defendant and moving party Adrean Williams'
Steven Taxman, Esq. of Bravo & Margulies, 415-512-6700 for plaintiff and opposing party Howard Smith Jr.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT ADREAN WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Language and purpose of Civil Code 1954.535 apply where good cause consists solely of landlords desire to move in. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/CK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Continued To Oct-16-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT ADREAN WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2006 ON COURT'S MOTION. PARTIES TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPIES AS SOON AS POSSIBLE WITH COVER LETTER NOTICING NEW HEARING DATE. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
